privileged_info_summary: The ECDIS route import task uses a synthetic RTZ file containing 4 waypoints for a Solent maritime training scenario. All waypoints match the metadata: WP1 at 50.6920°N, 1.0000°W (Pilot Station); WP2 at 50.7250°N, 1.0500°W (Outer Approach); WP3 at 50.7600°N, 1.0800°W (Inner Channel); WP4 at 50.8000°N, 1.1100°W (Berth Approach). The initial bearing from WP1 to WP2 is 316.2036° (claimed 316.2°), calculated using standard haversine bearing formula and verified to within tolerance.
